subject: Re: Term Sheet
body:
Hi Jeff,

I realize the last term sheet was a draft, my fault (my computer sync'd the draft with the same name).

Here is a correct version, the last page is the signature page. It would be great if I could get this back tomorrow. Nothing is due until the recap is complete, hopefully in about 4 weeks. I am planning to start those discussions the end of next week.

Things are going well. The more I learn the more excited I get. I will be at Tarana tomorrow discussing a window mount version to try to get to self-install. 1gbps in a self-install package would be the last step.

We will only need a tower ever 4-5km in the city, which is basically 2 or 3 rooftops for all of Boston. I met with American Tower today (I know their CEO and CTO) and they have plenty of room on the John Hancock.

Fun Stuff and great to be doing something together!

Greg
body_html:
Hi Jeff,

I realize the last term sheet was a draft, my fault (my computer sync'd the draft with the same name).

Here is a correct version, the last page is the signature page. It would be great if I could get this back tomorrow. Nothing is due until the recap is complete, hopefully in about 4 weeks. I am planning to start those discussions the end of next week.

Things are going well. The more I learn the more excited I get. I will be at Tarana tomorrow discussing a window mount version to try to get to self-install. 1gbps in a self-install package would be the last step.

We will only need a tower ever 4-5km in the city, which is basically 2 or 3 rooftops for all of Boston. I met with American Tower today (I know their CEO and CTO) and they have plenty of room on the John Hancock.

Fun Stuff and great to be doing something together!

Greg
